text:
Created attachment 219958
mail/dovecot-fts-xapian: Update to 1.4.4

Hi,

please find the patch attached.

    Changelog:
      - Fix Crash while indexing - terminate called after throwing an
        instance of 'std::bad_alloc'
        https://github.com/grosjo/fts-xapian/issues/59

Testport on 11.4, 12.1, 12.2, 13.0 OK.
